notes: Arm intangibility on frame 13-18. Charge hold is frame 5
On the ground: Invincible on frame 5-6, head/arm invincible on frame 7, and arm invincible on frame 7-57.
Follow with: Lariat, Back Body Drop, or Chest Bounce.
Following a grab, successful window for a lariat is frame 43-47. Any later is a failure and results in Back Body Drop or Chest Bounce. Damage-based armor 1—58 (14.338% in 1v1, 11.99% base).
You can hold the button to guarantee this particular attack. Damage-based armor 1—... (14.338% in 1v1, 11.99% base).

Landing hitbox on frame 1. Arm intangibility on frame 13-26. Damage=based armor on frame 4-15 (14.338% in 1v1, 11.99% base). Total frames is if you never land during the dive. Second landing lag is if you land too late.

Counter window 3-27. Next attack's damage increased by"((3-x) + (Max KB Multiplier) * (x-1)) / 2" where x = current damage dealt multiplier. Stores up to 3x Revenges for total damage combined. Revenge store is lost when you are grabbed or take 36% damage. Lasts 60 seconds at base. Jab 1/2 and the rising hits of Cross Chop don't remove revenge. For more info, including exact knockback multipliers, checkSmash Wiki's page on Revenge.
Invulnerable on frame 1-14 in addition to counter freeze frames.
Total frames includes 14 frames of hitlag
